target: 8. Lunch Time ①
It's only been two days since Ushio-chan passed away. You could rest for a while, you know~~.
No, no... I can't do that! No matter the time, as long as we're alive, we get hungry.
A restaurant... must always be there, unchanging...!!
What's important is the everyday routine. For the customers, and for us as a family...
Ugh...!! It certainly is delicious today too...!!
(Everyday routine... What Alain is trying to protect is the usual "everyday routine".)
(But... tomorrow at 9 AM— In just a few dozen hours, Hitogashima's everyday routine will be swallowed by pitch-black Shadows...)
(Like I'd let that happen...!! Never... again!!)
Disappeared... The entire Kobayakawa family!?
Kobayakawa-san talked to me just yesterday...
Well, I can't say much in detail yet, but detectives from the mainland will be here soon!
(As they exterminate the Shadows, the number of missing people will probably keep increasing from here on.)
(Which also means the Shadows are increasing by that much.)
Oh right! I have something I need to give to you, Shinpei-kun!
Could this be... Onee-chan's phone!?
Ushio-chan, you see... came to my place the day before she died. She left that... asking me to hold onto it for her.
"If something happens to me, I want you to give it to Shinpei-kun," she said.
(Come to think of it, what was Ushio thinking when she... Could it be... there's important information inside!?)
Mio, do you know the password?
Probably Onee-chan's birthday?
No... it won't open.
(As expected... I tried various things in the previous loop, but couldn't unlock it.)
Maybe she changed the password...?
Hmm…
(It was intentionally changed...)
(A 4-digit number combination is 10 to the 4th power, so 10,000 possibilities... I definitely can't solve it today or tomorrow...)
(Wait...! That girl... Ushio might know the password...?)
(Alright... I'll try showing this to her later...)
19. Lunch Time ②
July 23
Ah! Welcome back, Shin-chan!

How was it?
Shiori-chan…
Y... yeah...
(How should I talk about this... I can't exactly say that they've already been replaced by Shadows...)
Man~~~, it's hot, so hot!!
Welcome!
(Totsumura-san... He came here after going to check on the Kobayakawa family, huh.)
Ah.
Hey, Shinpei-kun! What was that, your report yesterday was a lie!! Where was the brawl—
Your usual B lunch with extra fried shrimp and a medium rice, right!
...Y-You know it well...
—Eh, disappeared... The entire Kobayakawa family!!?
Well, yeah...
Is it true, Shin-chan!!
Yeah...
You went inside with Shiomi-san too, didn't you?
A... yes.
Let me hear about it later.
No way... Kobayakawa-san talked to me just yesterday...
I know, right~~ Well, I can't say much in detail yet, but detectives from the mainland will be here soon!
(Totsumura-san's response is different...)
(Thank goodness... it's probably because I prevented the real Totsumura-san from being killed by the Shadow. This one is the real one!)
(Even if he looks unreliable, he's still a police officer. If we don't know what Kobayakawa Shiori's true identity is, maybe we should rely on the police's power here...)
Oh right!
(Oops, we spoke at the same time. What should I do?)
"There's something I'd like to consult with you about."
"I'd like you to make some time for me."
"Totsumura-san, you go first."
There's something I'd like to consult with you about...
What is it, so formally.
I'd like you to make some time for me...
That's fine, but... if it's something like you got involved with some dangerous folks in Tokyo, save that kind of talk for another time.
Like hell it is! ...I just have something I want to consult with you about.
Hmm, what kind of talk?
Totsumura-san, you go first.
Ah, is that alright? Then...
I have something I need to give to you! Here!
A <color=#GF_KEY_USI_SMARTPHONE>smartphone</color>...?
Ah!! Could this be... Onee-chan's!?
Ushio-chan, you see... came to my place the day before she died... She left that... asking me to hold onto it for her.
"If something happens to me, I want you to give it to Shinpei-kun," she said...!!
Ushio... gave this to me...!?
It's almost like... she knew, right? Ushio-chan... What was going to happen to her...
(Ushio, what did you know, and what were you thinking...)
(There's too much going on, my thoughts feel like they're going to get tangled up...)
July 23
(July 23rd— The day after the funeral, Alain already opened the shop.)
(I decided to help out at the shop with Mio)
(Moving your body is the best way to distract from the feeling of loss. I'm sure Alain and Mio felt the same way.)
(Fortunately, lunchtime that day was very busy.)
Alain, an order. One A lunch, two B lunches.
You got it!
Shinpei-kun, Shinpei-kun! A moment!
Yes, would you like to order something else? If it's alcohol, you should probably take it easy, you know?
No, no, that's not it! Did you find the person you were looking for?
Eh? The person I'm looking for...?
You said so when I saw you this morning!!
Come on!! You said you were looking for a woman with glasses and big boobs!!
Hah!?
(I don't remember talking about anything like that, and I haven't even met Nakamura-san in the first place?)
Was that really me? You're drinking too much in the middle of the day, Nakamura-san!
Welcome!
Man~~~~, it's hot, so hot!! I'll have the usual.
Eh?
Now then... hehehe.
Um... what's the usual...?
Hm!? Uwao!! What the!! It's Shinpei-kun!
...About Ushio-chan... I don't know what to say...
...Even if you say that while looking at a porn site...
S-Sorry... it's a daily routine, so I just...
Is that a police officer's daily routine?
(This person is <color=#GF_TIPS_012>Tetsu Totsumura</color>. He's a relative of the Kofune family, and a police officer living at the island's police box...)
(...Apparently, but seeing him like this makes me feel indescribable.)
Ah, Tetsu-san, welcome~~.
Mio-chan! You're cute today too~~~~.
(Porn cop...)
Your usual B lunch with extra fried shrimp and a medium rice, right!
Yeah, thanks! Shinpei-kun, that just now was my "usual". Make sure you remember it!
Haa...
Tetsu-san, what happened this morning? You didn't come to eat breakfast!
That's right... listen to this for a sec!? It was a huge ordeal!
Actually... the Kobayakawa family, the whole family disappeared.
Eh...
Disappeared?!
Like they were <color=#GF_TIPS_087>spirited away</color>... How about that!! A major incident, right?
Wait a minute! Kobayakawa, you mean... from Koba Mart...!?
Shinpei-kun, come here for a sec. It's not something to talk about too loudly.
A-Ah, yes.
This morning... They said Koba Mart wasn't open even at 8 o'clock...
The neighbor... you know... Mrs. Shiomi peeked into the main house...
And it was completely empty inside!
Well, that store... it seems they had a lot of debt, so it might be a midnight run...!!
T-Totsumura-san, your voice is loud!
O-Hey, Mio!?
Mio, where are you going!!
Oh my...
Shinpei, don't worry about the shop, sorry, but please go after Mio.
Got it!
